title: pyrus orbicularis
intro: Pyrus orbicularis, also known as the Chinese mountain apple, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that produces edible fruits. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pyrus orbicularis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially lowering cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the fruit and bark of the plant can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
